## Why

Describe the problem and the intended outcome.

## Change

Summarize the focused implementation and any rejected alternatives.

## Evidence

- [ ] Project-native checks pass
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior or the reason they do not is documented
- [ ] Security, privacy, accessibility, compatibility, and release impact were reviewed
- [ ] User-facing documentation and release notes are updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets, private data, unrelated generated files, or unexplained dependencies are included
